name: Snap Todo
description:
Snap Todo lets you write and manage your todos without friction

The Quick Capture Philosophy
	- Hit [Alt + T]
	- Write
	- Press [Enter]

The Fluidity System
	- Open Snap-todo with [Alt + T] (Customizable)
	- Navigate with [Up], [Down] or [Tab]
	- Reorder Todos with [Alt + Up/Down]
	- Mark a todo complete with [Space]
	- Delete Todo with [Delete]
	- Exit with [Esc]
